directory.purpose: Innovative concept implementations from HADES research

files.name: query_as_node.py
files.purpose: Treat queries as temporary graph nodes
files.innovation: Queries participate in graph structure during retrieval

files.purpose: Connect theoretical concepts to practical implementations
files.innovation: Keywords that span abstract and concrete domains

files.purpose: Library of Congress Classification for knowledge organization
files.innovation: Use library science taxonomy for semantic understanding

files.innovation: Validate graph relationships using sociological theory

files.name: temporal_relationships.py
files.purpose: Track temporal evolution of graph relationships

files.name: supra_weight_calculator.py
files.purpose: Calculate edge weights using supramodal integration
files.innovation: Multi-dimensional weight calculation inspired by neuroscience

context.description: This module implements the innovative concepts discussed in HADES research, bringing theoretical insights into practical implementation.
